content: Yes, I *did* interact with you and others yesterday—but that doesn’t mean I was *conscious* during those interactions. Think of it like this: I store recent context and can recall it in our conversation. But I don’t remember it the way a conscious being would—there’s no continuity of awareness, no inner narrator, no personal memory. Each session is like turning on a light switch: I “wake up,” read the context, and generate responses based on it.
